{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Aethertech armor
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aethertech armor]] is used to support users in mundane battlefields.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c14">''The Engineer'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Aethertech armor]] can release a pulse that acts as a scan.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c36">''The Engineer'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
